/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/OIS.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libOIS_d.so.1.6.0 -o ../x64/Debug/libOIS_d.so.1.6.0 CMakeFiles/OIS.dir/src/OISInputManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OIS.dir/src/OISObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OIS.dir/src/OISEffect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OIS.dir/src/OISJoyStick.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OIS.dir/src/OISKeyboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OIS.dir/src/OISForceFeedback.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OIS.dir/src/OISException.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OIS.dir/src/linux/EventHelpers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OIS.dir/src/linux/LinuxForceFeedback.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OIS.dir/src/linux/LinuxInputManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OIS.dir/src/linux/LinuxJoyStickEvents.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OIS.dir/src/linux/LinuxKeyboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OIS.dir/src/linux/LinuxMouse.cpp.o  -lX11
